purpose: Run Nemotron-3-Ultra as a coding agent that reads, edits, and executes tasks using the AEA tool-calling protocol.
motive: Replace expensive cloud model calls (Claude/GPT-4o) with free Nemotron reasoning. Every task completed here is implied cost avoided and logged to the FinOps ledger.
data_produced: File edits in the working directory
SQLite ledger transaction (implied vs actual cost)
tools_available: read_file  — read file contents with optional line range
search_code — grep-style pattern search across files
new_file   — create a new file with content
run_cmd    — execute a shell command with output capture
done       — signal task completion with summary
